description: Create the complete asuransi-perjalanan.html page with all sections: hero, benefits/coverage, premium table, premium calculator, FAQ, and CTA. The page follows the exact structure of asuransi-mobil.html but adapted for travel insurance content.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/asuransi-perjalanan.html following the structure of asuransi-mobil.html

Add page-specific <style> block with travel-themed color variables (e.g., --travel-teal, --travel-dark, --travel-light) and keyword highlight classes (.kw-travel, .kw-coverage, .kw-destination) with non-clashing colors and dark mode support
Add hero section with breadcrumb, travel badge, question-style headline, stat grid (183 days max, 5 regions, 2 plans, 3 age groups), and CTA buttons

Add 'Mengapa Butuh Asuransi Perjalanan' section with advantage cards covering: medical expenses abroad, trip cancellation, baggage loss/delay, flight delay, personal accident, personal liability - all in question-style language
Add coverage regions section explaining the 5 regions: Worldwide Including Americas, Worldwide Excluding Americas, Asia Pacific & Schengen, Greater Asia, Schengen Basic
Add plans comparison section showing Superior vs Deluxe plans with coverage types (Individual, Couple, Family) and age groups
Add premium table section with responsive scrollable tables showing premium data for at least the main age group (14d-59y Individual) with all durations and regions

Add premium calculator section with form inputs: Age Group dropdown, Coverage Type dropdown, Destination Region dropdown, Plan dropdown (disabled when Schengen Basic selected), Trip Duration number input (1-183 days). Include the full premiumData lookup table and calculatePremium function in JavaScript. Display result formatted as Rupiah. Show 'Not Covered' message for 0 values. Include disclaimer text.
Add FAQ section with question-style items about travel insurance
Add CTA section with WhatsApp link
Add footer div and load main.js at end of body
Ensure all content uses question-style language throughout (Pernahkah kamu..., Tahukah kamu..., Bagaimana jika...)
Ensure NO insurance brand names appear in the displayed text
Ensure calculator handles all edge cases: duration > 31 days uses 26-31 rate + per_week rate, 0 values show 'Opsi tidak ditanggung', invalid input shows error messages
acceptance_criteria: Page has valid HTML5 structure with proper meta tags, dark mode script, and link to /assets/style.css
Page includes #site-header and #site-footer divs and loads /assets/main.js
Page has page-specific CSS with travel-themed colors and keyword highlight classes that support dark mode
Page uses question-style language throughout all sections
No insurance brand names appear in displayed text
Premium calculator handles all 3 age groups, 3 coverage types, 5 regions, 2 plans, and durations 1-183 days
Calculator correctly computes premiums for trips > 31 days using the formula: premium_31 + ceil((days-31)/7) * per_week_rate
Calculator shows 'Not Covered' for 0 values (e.g., Schengen Basic for 70-84 age group)
Calculator disables Plan dropdown when Schengen Basic is selected
Calculator displays result in Rupiah format (e.g., Rp 1.500.000)
Calculator shows disclaimer text about included/excluded fees
Premium table displays data in responsive scrollable format
verification: Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/asuransi-perjalanan.html','utf8'); console.log('File exists:', html.length > 0); console.log('Has DOCTYPE:', html.includes('<!DOCTYPE html>')); console.log('Has style.css:', html.includes('/assets/style.css')); console.log('Has main.js:', html.includes('/assets/main.js')); console.log('Has site-header:', html.includes('site-header')); console.log('Has site-footer:', html.includes('site-footer')); console.log('Has calculator:', html.includes('calculatePremium') || html.includes('premiumData')); console.log('No brand names:', !html.includes('Manulife') && !html.includes('AIG') && !html.includes('Allianz'));"
Run: node -e to extract and execute the calculator function, verify it returns correct values for known inputs (e.g., 14d-59y, individual, worldwide_inc, superior, 5 days should return 481000)
findings: Page created successfully. All verification tests pass including: file structure, calculator logic (8 test cases), 29 structural checks. NODE_OPTIONS env var needs to be unset for node commands to work in this sandbox.
